name: Ham and Cheese Crescent Roll-Ups
description: This ham and cheese crescent roll-up recipe requires just 3-simple ingredients, making them a quick and easy meal that both kids and adults will love.
ingredients: 1 (8 ounce) can Pillsbury® Refrigerated Crescent Dinner Rolls
4 thin slices Cheddar cheese, cut into strips
steps: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Separate crescent dough into 8 triangles on a flat work surface. Place 1 slice ham on each triangle; place 2 cheese strips down center of ham. Fold in edges of ham to match dough triangle shape.
Roll up each crescent roll, starting at wide end, ending at triangle tip. Place rolls, tips down, on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 15 to 19 minutes. Remove from cookie sheet immediately; serve warm.
